zh.lifeSummary: 當Michel Scheffer於1524年出生在德國巴登-爾特波格恩可萊斯斯特勞本哈特奧頓豪森時，他的父親Hans Schäffer23歲，母親Agnes Riehm39歲。他於1536年與Barbara Diegle在德國爾特波格可萊斯 伯布林根辛德爾分根結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1607年6月3日在德國貝也普法爾茲享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Michel Scheffer于1524年出生在德国巴登-爾特波格恩可萊斯斯特勞本哈特奧頓豪森时，他的父亲Hans Schäffer23岁，母亲Agnes Riehm39岁。他于1536年与Barbara Diegle在德国爾特波格可萊斯 伯布林根辛德爾分根结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1607年6月3日在德国貝也普法爾茲享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: Scheffer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of Schäffer (see Schaffer 2). It is also found in Hungary.

variants.name: Sheffey
meanings: Probably an Americanized form of German   Scheffer  .

variants.name: Schaffer
meanings: German: occupational name for a steward or bailiff, from an agent derivative of Middle High German schaffen ‘to manage’. It is also found in France (mainly Alsace and Lorraine), Hungary, Denmark, Czechia, Slovakia, and Slovenia; see also 3 below.

South German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) (Schäffer): variant of Schäfer (see Schaefer ). It is also found in Hungary, Denmark, Czechia, Slovakia, and Slovenia. Compare Cheffer , Schaeffer , Shaeffer , Shafer , Shaffer , and Sheaffer .
Germanized form of Hungarian Sáfár, Slovenian and Croatian Šafar or Šafer, Czech Šafář or Šafer, Slovak Šafár, cognates of 1 above (see Safar ).

nameMeanings.name: Michel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Michael
meanings: form of a common biblical name (meaning ‘who is like God?’ in Hebrew) borne by one of the archangels, the protector of the ancient Hebrews, who is also regarded as a saint of the Catholic Church. In the Middle Ages, Michael was regarded as captain of the heavenly host (see Revelation 12:7–9), symbol of the Church Militant, and patron of soldiers. He was often depicted bearing a flaming sword. The name is also borne by a Persian prince and ally of Belshazzar mentioned in the Book of Daniel. Since the early 1900s it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names in the English-speaking world.  See also  Michal .

en.lifeSummary: When Michel Scheffer was born in 1524, in Ottenhausen, Straubenhardt, Enzkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, his father, Hans Schäffer, was 23 and his mother, Agnes Riehm, was 39. He married Barbara Diegle in 1536, in Sindelfingen, Böblingen, Württemberg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 3 June 1607, in Palatinate, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Michel Scheffer est né en 1524, à Ottenhausen, Straubenhardt, Enzkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Hans Schäffer, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Agnes Riehm, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Barbara Diegle en 1536, à Sindelfingen, Kreis Böblingen, Württemberg, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 3 juin 1607, à Pfalz, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 83 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Michel Schefferが1524年にドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグエンズクレイスストラウベンハートオッテンハウセンで生まれた時，父Hans Schäfferは23歳，母Agnes Riehmは39歳であった。1536年にドイツウuルッテンバーグクレイス ブoブリンジェンシンデルフィンジェンでBarbara Diegleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1607年6月3日にドイツバイエルンプファルズで83歳で死去した。

ko.WEILDERSTADT, Germany,, Germany: 독일 바데-wu르테버그 크레이스 브o블링 위 데르 스타드트
ko.lifeSummary: Michel Scheffer(이)가 1524년 독일 바데-wu르테버그 즈크레이스 스트라벤하르드트 오텐하우센에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hans Schäffer(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Riehm(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1536년 독일 wu르테버그 크레이스 브o블링 신델핀겐에서 Barbara Diegle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1607년 6월 3일 독일 베이른 p팔즈에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Michel Scheffer nasceu em 1524, em Ottenhausen, Straubenhardt, Enzkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Hans Schäffer, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Riehm, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Barbara Diegle em 1536, em Sindelfingen, Kreis Böblingen, Württemberg, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 3 de junho de 1607, em Pfalz, Bayern, Alemanha, com 83 anos.

ru.WEILDERSTADT, Germany,, Germany: вил дир стадт, крис бoблинген, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Michel Scheffer родился в 1524 г. в местности оттенаусен, страубенардт, энзкрис, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия, его отцу по имени Hans Schäffer было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Riehm, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Barbara Diegle в 1536 г. в местности синделфинген, крис бoблинген, вuрттембирг, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 3 июня 1607 г. в местности пфалз, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 83 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Michel Scheffer nació en 1524, en Ottenhausen, Straubenhardt, Enzkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania, su papá, Hans Schäffer, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Agnes Riehm, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Barbara Diegle en 1536, en Sindelfingen, Kreis Böblingen, Württemberg, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 3 de junio de 1607, en Pfalz, Bayern, Alemania, a la edad de 83 años.
